cron:
PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/root/bin


0 4 * * * /root/aads/scripts/disk_cleanup.sh >> /var/log/aads-disk-cleanup.log 2>&1




*/5 * * * * /root/aads/aads-server/scripts/pre_deploy_validate.sh >> /var/log/aads-validate.log 2>&1

0 4 * * * /root/aads/aads-server/scripts/update_claude_all_servers.sh >> /var/log/claude_update.log 2>&1

0 4 * * 0 docker system prune -f >> /var/log/docker_disk_cleanup.log 2>&1

0 5 1 * * docker system df >> /var/log/docker_disk_cleanup.log 2>&1
